findings.evidence: `rg -n "pair-law bridge|Obtained from|conditional-expectation tower" code/TauCeti/Probability/DeFinetti/CondExpConvergence.lean` hits lines 71-72 for this theorem.
findings.fix: Move the proof-method sentence to an internal comment or remove it from the public docstring; keep the docstring to the conditional-expectation equality and its hypotheses.
findings.issue: The docstring for `Contractable.condExp_indicator_future_eq` includes proof provenance rather than just the result: it says the theorem is the pair-law bridge fed by `Contractable.pairLaw_eq`.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "Obtained from|conditional-expectation tower" code/TauCeti/Probability/DeFinetti/CondExpConvergence.lean` hits lines 87-89 in this public theorem docstring.
findings.fix: Remove or relocate the proof-strategy sentence; the public docstring should state the equality of the two tail conditional expectations.
findings.issue: The docstring for `Contractable.condExp_indicator_tailProcess_eq` documents how the theorem is proved (`Obtained from ... by the conditional-expectation tower`) instead of only what it states.

summary: The public declarations are documented, but several docstrings describe proof strategy instead of the mathematical object/result.
